rationale: Phase 59 bitwise operators closed the (mask / pow2) % 2 workaround gap; benchmark rewritten to ((mask >> i) & 1) == 1 making it structurally identical to solution.c. Fresh 5-run measurement 2026-04-10: all runs 1.0x speed (Iron 710-715ms vs C 712-720ms, Iron sometimes faster). Threshold set to project floor 1.5x per audit policy.
